message:
feat(ui): add Fleet dashboard for RU repository management

Implements the Fleet (Repo Updater) frontend dashboard:

- Add Fleet route and navigation item with GitBranch icon
- Create useFleet hooks for all RU API endpoints:
  - Fleet stats, repos, groups, needs-sync queries
  - Sweep sessions and plans queries
  - Mutations for start/approve/cancel sweeps, approve/reject plans
  - Add/remove repo mutations
- Build complete Fleet page with tabbed interface:
  - Repository list with status indicators and filtering
  - Expandable repo details with sync status and flags
  - Sweep session management with progress tracking
  - Plan approval workflow with risk level display
  - Add repository form with auto-URL generation
- All components follow existing design patterns
- Mock data support for development without backend

Closes: flywheel_gateway-7rr

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

   { label: "DCG", icon: Shield, to: "/dcg" },
